basic_details.job_title: MSETCL – Chief Engineer & Superintending Engineer – 4 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company Limited (MSETCL) Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Chief Engineer (Transmission) & Superintending Engineer (Transmission). Candidates with B.E/B.Tech Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 12-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through MSETCL official website mahatransco.in.

age_limit.age_details: Open Category: 50 years, Reserved Category: 55 years, Departmental: 57 years

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors Degree in Electrical Engineering / Technology

salary_details.pay_scale: Chief Engineer: Rs. 140655-5980-272215/-, Superintending Engineer: Rs.109935-4740-133635-5245-243780/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MSETCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: MAHATRANSCO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Chief Engineer & Superintending Engineer Posts
